news.t: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits

holdings.infoBox: KRMA is an equity ETF with a total of 145 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.88%, Apple at 5.83%, Alphabet at 5.00%, Microsoft at 3.58%, and Amazon.com at 2.78%.

overview.description: The Global X Conscious Companies ETF (KRMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index composed of U.S.-listed companies that exhibit environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) characteristics. KRMA was launched on Jul 11, 2016 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Concinnity Conscious Companies Index GTR Index

data.title: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
data.text: Investors are rapidly moving toward investing with environmental, social and corporate-governance (ESG) qualities in mind.
